mapper.select: SELECT /* /appform/modelMonthlyList : McpAppformMapper.selectModelMonthlyList : 할부개월 */ INST_NOM AS MODEL_MONTHLY FROM ORG_INST_NOM_MST WHERE SALE_PLCY_CD = #{modelSalePolicyCode} GROUP BY INST_NOM ORDER BY INST_NOM
SELECT /* /appform/monthlyListMarket : McpAppformMapper.monthlyListMarket : 약정 */ AGRM_TRM AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM MSP_SALE_AGRM_MST WHERE SALE_PLCY_CD = #{modelSalePolicyCode}

SELECT /* /appform/prdtColorList : McpAppformMapper.selectPrdtColorList : 색상정보 */ A.PRDT_COLR_CD AS REQ_MODEL_COLOR , B.CD_DSC AS REQ_MODEL_COLOR_NM , PRDT_ID AS MODEL_ID , PRDT_NM FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} AND A.RPRS_YN = 'N' AND A.PRDT_COLR_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0044'

SELECT /* /appform/agentInfoOjb : McpAppformMapper.selectAgentCode : 대리점 코드 */ KT_ORG_ID , ORGN_NM , ROADN_ADR_ZIPCD , ROADN_ADR_BAS_SBST , ROADN_ADR_DTL_SBST FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE 1=1 AND ORGN_ID = #{cntpntShopId} AND ROWNUM = 1

WITH CNTR AS ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.USER_SSN , D.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.SUB_STATUS , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , A.ICC_ID , A.LGL_AGNT_SSN , ( -- 기변이력이 2건 이상인 경우 처리를 위하여 MAX 사용 SELECT MAX(ENGG_INFO) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT MAX(DECODE(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 'none', SUBSTR(X.APP_START_DD, 1, 8), SUBSTR(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 1, 8)) || NVL(X.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '0')) OVER (PARTITION BY X.CONTRACT_NUM) AS ENGG_INFO FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO X , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST Y WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS != 'C') AND X.MODEL_CHN_CD = '01' AND X.CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND X.EVNT_TRTM_NO = Y.EVNT_TRTM_NO AND Y.APPL_END_DTTM LIKE '99991231%' AND Y.EVNT_CD = 'C07' UNION -- 심플할인 -- SIM_START_DT 최대 값을 구하고 -- SIM_START_DT 최대 값에 대한 약정 개월... SELECT SUBSTR(X.SIM_START_DT, 1, 8) || X.ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO X WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS != 'C') AND X.EVNT_CD = 'SIM' AND X.GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD = 'A' AND X.APP_END_DATE LIKE '99991231%' AND X.SIM_START_DT = ( SELECT MAX(X2.SIM_START_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO X2 WHERE X2.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS != 'C') AND X2.EVNT_CD = 'SIM' AND X2.GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD = 'A' AND X2.APP_END_DATE LIKE '99991231%' GROUP BY X2.CONTRACT_NUM ) UNION -- 기변개발전 우수기변 대상 SELECT DECODE(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 'none', MIN(SUBSTR(X.APP_START_DD, 1, 8)), SUBSTR(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 1, 8)) || MAX(X.ENGG_MNTH_CNT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO X WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS != 'C') AND X.EVNT_CD IN ('UPD','UAD') AND X.MODEL_CHN_CD = '01' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = X.CONTRACT_NUM AND APPL_END_DTTM LIKE '99991231%' ) GROUP BY X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, X.CONTRACT_NUM UNION -- 일반적인 경우 SELECT DISTINCT X.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE || NVL(Y.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '0') FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO X , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO Y WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS != 'C') AND X.CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND Y.MODEL_CHN_CD != '01' AND Y.ENGG_MNTH_CNT IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD = 'SIM' AND GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD = 'A' AND APP_END_DATE LIKE '99991231%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD IN ('UPD', 'UAD') AND MODEL_CHN_CD = '01' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = X.CONTRACT_NUM AND APPL_END_DTTM LIKE '99991231%' ) ) ) AS ENGG_INFO , DECODE(B.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS HIST_YN , DECODE(B.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, '', SUBSTR(MAX(B.APPL_STRT_DTTM) OVER(PARTITION BY B.APPL_STRT_DTTM), 1, 8)) AS DVC_CHG_DT , C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT AS DVC_ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST B , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO C , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO D WHERE A.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.REQUEST_KEY(+) IS NOT NULL AND ( B.APPL_END_DTTM(+) LIKE '99991231%' OR TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.APPL_END_DTTM(+), 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.APPL_STRT_DTTM(+), 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') >= 15 ) AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.EVNT_TRTM_NO = C.EVNT_TRTM_NO(+) AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = D.CUSTOMER_ID AND REPLACE(D.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME,' ') = UPPER(TRIM(#{customerLinkName})) AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} ORDER BY B.APPL_STRT_DTTM DESC ) SELECT /* /appform/selRMemberAjax : McpAppformMapper.selectSelRMemberAjax : 기기변경 고객정보 확인 일반기변 , 우수기변 */ A.CONTRACT_NUM CONTRACT_NUM -- 가입계약번호 , A.USER_SSN CUSTOMER_SSN -- 주민등록번호 , A.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME -- 고객이름 , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO SUBSCRIBER_NO -- 전화번호_이전CTN , A.LGL_AGNT_SSN , CASE WHEN A.HIST_YN = 'Y' AND (SYSDATE - TO_DATE(A.DVC_CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15) THEN 'N' WHEN ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.ENGG_INFO,1,8), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_NUMBER(NVL(SUBSTR(A.ENGG_INFO, 9,2), 0))) - SYSDATE > TO_NUMBER(B.CD_VAL) THEN 'E' ELSE 'Y' END AS DVC_CHG_YN FROM CNTR A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE B.GRP_ID = 'RCP0028' AND B.ETC1 = '10' AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT /* /appform/checkValidUsimNo : McpAppformMapper.checkValidUsimNo */ COUNT(1) FROM MSP_REUSE_USIM_MST WHERE 1=1 AND USIM_NO = #{usimNo} AND USIM_STATUS = 'L'

SELECT /* /appform/selectInsrProdList : McpAppformMapper.selectInsrProdList 분실파손 보험 조회 */ DISTINCT T1.INSR_PROD_CD , T1.CMPN_LMT_AMT , T1.INSR_ENGG_CNT , DTL_CD_NM AS INSR_PROD_NM FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MST T1 , ( SELECT DTL_CD , DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'IntmInsrRelNm' ) T2 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.INSR_PROD_CD = T2.DTL_CD(+) AND T1.USG_YN = 'Y'
AND T1.INSR_TYPE_CD = '02'
AND T1.INSR_PROD_CD IN (SELECT INSR_PROD_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_REL WHERE RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} AND APPL_YN = 'Y')
ORDER BY T1.CMPN_LMT_AMT DESC

SELECT /* /appform/checkLimitOpenFormCount : McpAppformMapper.checkLimitOpenFormCount 동일명의 회선 90일 이내에에 개통/개통취소 이력이 10회 */ COUNT(A.CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A, MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE 1=1 AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 90,'YYYYMMDD') AND B.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' -- I 개인 B 법인 AND A.PPPO = 'PO' -- 후불 AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' -- 해지상태 고객 AND A.SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE IN ('PN6','PN7') -- PN6 당일취소 / PN7 14일이내취소
AND B.CUSTOMER_SSN = #{cstmrNativeRrn} --주민번호 일반
AND B.CUSTOMER_SSN = #{cstmrNativeRrn} --주민번호
AND B.CUSTOMER_SSN = #{cstmrForeignerRrn} --외국인번호
AND 1 = 0

SELECT /* /appform/getDisPrmtId : McpAppformMapper.selectDisPrmtSlsTp 가입유형 찾아오기 */ ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0092' AND CD_VAL = (SELECT KTA.SLS_NO FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_MST KTA , MSP_KT_PLCY_DISCOUNT KTB , MSP_KT_PLCY_OPER KTC , MSP_KT_PLCY_INST KTD , MSP_KT_PLCY_ENGG KTE WHERE KTA.PLCY_ID = KTB.PLCY_ID AND KTA.PLCY_ID = KTC.PLCY_ID AND KTA.PLCY_ID = KTD.PLCY_ID AND KTA.PLCY_ID = KTE.PLCY_ID AND KTA.USE_YN = 'Y' AND KTA.PPPO = 'PO' AND KTA.PLCY_TYPE = DECODE(#{reqBuyType}, 'MM', '01', DECODE(#{usimKindsCd},'09','03','02')) AND KTB.DC_TYPE = NVL(#{sprtTp}, 'NN') AND KTC.OPER_TYPE = #{operType} AND KTD.INST_CNT = NVL(#{modelMonthly}, '0') AND KTE.ENGG_CNT = NVL(#{enggMnthCnt}, '0') AND ROWNUM = 1)
mapper.update:
INSERT INTO /* /appform/mcpRequestAdditionPromotion : McpAppformMapper.insertMcpRequestAdditionPromotion 부가서비스 프로모션 등록 */ MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY , ADDITION_KEY , ADDITION_NAME , RANTAL ) SELECT #{requestKey} , A.ADDITION_KEY , B.ADDITION_NAME , B.RANTAL FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL A , MCP_ADDITION@DL_MCP B WHERE 1=1 AND A.ADDITION_KEY = B.ADDITION_KEY AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.ORGN_ID = #{cntpntShopId} --접점코드 AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = #{reqBuyType} --구매유형
AND A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_12 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_18 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_24 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_30 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_36 = 'Y'
AND 1 = 0
AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y'
AND A.NAC_YN = 'Y'
AND 1 = 0
AND A.RATE_CD = #{socCode} --요금제코드 AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = #{onOffType} --온라인오프라인구분 AND A.USG_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT /* /appform/existsAbuseImei : McpAppformMapper.existsAbuseImei */ COUNT(1) FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_ABUSE_MST A , MSP_ABUSE_IMEI B WHERE A.MST_SEQ = B.MST_SEQ AND A.OPEN_YN = 'N' AND B.REG_YN = 'Y' AND B.IMEI = #{imei} )

SELECT /* /appform/getCpntId : McpAppformMapper.selectCpntId (대리점)안면인증 가능 접점ID조회 */ CPNT_ID FROM ( SELECT CPNT_ID FROM MDS_ORG_CPNT_INFO WHERE FILE_NM = (SELECT MAX(FILE_NM) FROM MDS_ORG_CPNT_INFO) AND CPNT_ID IN (SELECT CPNT_ID FROM MDS_ORG_REL_INFO WHERE ORG_ID = (SELECT KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{cntpntShopId}) AND FILE_NM = (SELECT MAX(FILE_NM) FROM MDS_ORG_REL_INFO) ) AND CH_TYPE_DIV_CD = '02' --비대면 (안면인증) AND SALE_TYPE_DIV_CD = '14' --비대면 (안면인증) ORDER BY CPNT_NO_SEQ ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT /* /appform/requestJoinDataByRjoinKeyNew : McpAppformMapper.selectRequestJoinDataByRjoinKeyNew 요금조회 */ CASE WHEN MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB = 1 then 0 WHEN MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT) <= 0 then 0 ELSE TRUNC((MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT))*0.059/12*POWER((1+0.059/12), MODEL_MONTHLY)/(POWER((1+0.059/12), MODEL_MONTHLY)-1),0) - TRUNC(((MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT))/MODEL_MONTHLY),0) END AS MODEL_MM_CHARGE, CASE WHEN INST_AMT <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE DECODE(MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, 1, 0, ROUND( ( INST_AMT + ( TRUNC(INST_AMT * 0.059 / 12 * VAL_POW / (VAL_POW-1),0) * MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB - INST_AMT ) ) / MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB ,0) ) END AS MODEL_MM_PAYMENT, /*핸드폰 월 납부액 단말요금 : (할부원금+총할부수수료)/할부개월수 */
CASE WHEN MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB = 1 THEN 0 WHEN MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT) <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE DECODE(MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, 1, 0, TRUNC((MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT))/ MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) ) END AS REAL_MM_MONEY, /* 월 할부금 */
CASE WHEN INST_AMT > 0 THEN DECODE(MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, 1, MAINDATA.TEL_MM_PATMENT, ROUND( ( INST_AMT + ( TRUNC(INST_AMT * 0.059 / 12 * VAL_POW / (VAL_POW-1),0) * MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB - INST_AMT ) ) / MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB ,0) + MAINDATA.TEL_MM_PATMENT ) ELSE MAINDATA.TEL_MM_PATMENT END AS BASIC_MM_PAYMENT, RWD_PROD_CD, CLAUSE_RWD_FLAG, RWD_AUTH_INFO, MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT AS CONTRACT_SUPPORT, MODEL_MONTHLY, '4' AS PAGE4DEFAULT, ' ' AS DUMMY_DATA, MAINDATA.* FROM ( SELECT REQUEST_KEY, MODEL_PRICE-(NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) + NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) + NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0) ) AS INST_AMT, -- 할부원금 POWER((1+0.059/12), MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) AS VAL_POW, -- 년 수수년 계산 CASE WHEN SPRT_TP = 'KD' THEN '0' WHEN SPRT_TP = 'PM' THEN '2' WHEN REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'UU' AND ENGG_MNTH_CNT > 1 THEN '1' ELSE '' END DISCOUNTPR, MODEL_PRICE, PROD_TYPE, /* GREATEST(NVL( (MODEL_PRICE ) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0), 0),0) AS MODEL_INSTALLMENT, */ DECODE( PROD_TYPE,'02','0', '01',GREATEST(NVL( (MODEL_PRICE ) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0) - SETTL_AMT, 0),0), NULL,GREATEST(NVL( (MODEL_PRICE ) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0), 0),0) ) AS MODEL_INSTALLMENT, -- - SETTL_AMT 고객수납금 ... /* MODEL_PRICE as model_price,*/ /* GREATEST(NVL( (MODEL_PRICE ) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0), 0),0) AS MODEL_INSTALLMENT,*/ NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) + NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) AS OPEN_DISCOUNT, NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0) AS ADD_DISCOUNT, SETTL_AMT AS MODEL_DISCOUNT, --고객수납금 NVL(INST_INTRATE, 0.25 ) AS INST_INTRATE, MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, RES_NO, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE_ORG, CSTMR_TYPE, ETC_SPECIAL, DECODE( USIM_KINDS_CD,'09','', REQ_USIM_NAME ) AS REQ_USIM_NAME, DECODE( USIM_KINDS_CD,'09',EID, REQ_USIM_SN ) AS REQ_USIM_SN, PHONE_PAYMENT, REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY, REQ_IN_DAY_MM, REQ_IN_DAY_DD, REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY AS REQUEST_YEAR, REQ_IN_DAY_MM AS REQUEST_MONTH, REQ_IN_DAY_DD AS REQUEST_DAY, REQ_ADDITION, REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, USIM_PRICE_TYPE, USIM_PRICE, JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, CSTMR_NAME, NVL(CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG, 'N') as CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN, CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, CSTMR_MAIL, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_YYYY, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_MM, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_DD, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_YYYY, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_MM, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_DD, CSTMR_ADDR, CSTMR_ADDR_BJD, CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQ_BANK, REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, REQ_WANT_NUMBER, REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, REQ_WIRE_TYPE, REQ_AC01_BALANCE, REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, REQ_AC02_DAY, REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, REQ_GUIDE, REQ_GUIDE_FN, REQ_GUIDE_MN, REQ_GUIDE_RN, MOVE_MOBILE_FN, RWD_MOBILE_NO, MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_1, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_2, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_3, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_4, MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, MOVE_COMPANY, MOVE_COMPANY_MVNO, TRUNC (MONTHLY_FEE * 1.1, -1) AS MONTHLY_FEE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, RATE_NAME, TEL_MM_PATMENT, REQ_CARD_COMPANY, REQ_CARD_NO, PAGE3DEFAULT, AGENT_CODE, NAME_CHANGE_NM, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, NAME_CHANGE_RRN, NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, ENTRUST_REQ_NM, ENTRUST_RES_NM, ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, ENTRUST_RES_RRN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, SERVICE_TYPE, REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, REQ_CARD_NAME, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REQ_MODEL_NAME, (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0044' AND CD_VAL = REQ_MODEL_COLOR) AS REQ_MODEL_COLOR, CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) <= 1 THEN 'R' WHEN TO_NUMBER(MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) > 1 THEN 'P' ELSE 'S' END AS MODEL_MONTHLY_TYPE, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG, OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION, SOC_CODE, CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, NVL(CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, 'N') as CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, APP_CD, APP_CD_NAME,ETC_DISCOUNT, MODEL_MONTHLY, NVL(CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP,'N') AS CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, --단말배상금 안내사항 동의여부 NVL(CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR,'N') AS CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, --단말배상금(부분파손) 안내사항 동의여부 NVL(CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE,'N') AS CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, --중고렌탈 프로그램 서비스 이용에 대한 동의서 동의여부 CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, --선불요금제 MPPS35 제약사항 동의 여부 CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, --동부화재 제휴 요금제 약관 동의 여부 CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG, INSR_CD, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, --온라인인증유형(C:카드,X:공인인증서) INSR_PROD_CD, --단말보험코드 CLAUSE_INSR_PROD_FLAG, --단말보험가입동의 INSR_AUTH_INFO --단말보험인증정보 , DECODE( REQ_BUY_TYPE,'MM','P',DECODE(USIM_KINDS_CD,'09','E','U') ) AS USIM_KINDS_CD -- USIM, eSIM , 단말기 구분 , CASE WHEN USIM_KINDS_CD ='09' AND ON_OFF_TYPE = '5' THEN REQ_PHONE_SN WHEN USIM_KINDS_CD ='09' AND ON_OFF_TYPE = '7' THEN REQ_PHONE_SN WHEN USIM_KINDS_CD ='09' AND ON_OFF_TYPE = '9' THEN REQ_PHONE_SN ELSE '' END REQ_PHONE_SN --eSIM 셀프 개통 일때만 표현 , PRNTS_BILL_NO , RWD_PROD_CD , CLAUSE_RWD_FLAG , RWD_AUTH_INFO , NVL(PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, 'N') as PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE -- 고객 혜택 제공을 위한 개인정보 수집 및 이용 관련 동의 , NVL(CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, 'N') as CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG -- 개인정보 처리 위탁 및 고객 혜택 제공을 위한 광고 수신 동의 , NVL(OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, 'N') as OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE -- 혜택 제공을 위한 제3자 제공 동의(엠모바일) , SETTL_WAY_CD , JEHU_PROD_TYPE , NVL(CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG, 'N') as CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG , OPEN_MARKET_REFERER , JEHU_PARTNER_TYPE , NVL(OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE, 'N') as OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE -- 혜택 제공을 위한 제3자 제공 동의(KT) , NVL(OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE, 'N') as OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE -- 제3자 제공관련 광고 수신 동의 , NVL(CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , 'N') as CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG -- 민감정보(생체인식정보)수집 및 이용동의 , NVL(CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , 'N') as CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG2 -- 민감정보(생체인식정보)수집 및 이용동의 , NVL(COMBINE_SOLO_FLAG , 'N') as COMBINE_SOLO_FLAG -- 아무나솔로 결합 신청 동의 , NVL(INDV_LOCA_PRV_AGREE , 'N') as INDV_LOCA_PRV_AGREE -- 개인위치정보 제 3자 제공 동의 , NVL(KT_COUNSEL_AGREE , 'N') as KT_COUNSEL_AGREE -- 인터넷 가입 상담을 위한 개인정보 제 3자 제공 동의 FROM ( SELECT A.*, TRUNC( ( (NVL(b.DC_AMT,0) ) + NVL(b.ADD_DC_AMT,0)) * 1.1 , 0) AS DISCOUNT_PRICE, TRUNC(A.MONTHLY_FEE * 1.1 - ( ((NVL(b.DC_AMT,0)) + NVL(b.ADD_DC_AMT,0)) * 1.1), -1) AS TEL_MM_PATMENT FROM ( SELECT MQ.REQUEST_KEY, OSPM.INST_RATE AS INST_INTRATE, MQ.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO AS RES_NO, MRS.SOC_CODE, MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, MRS.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE /*MRS.MODEL_PRICE*/ /*, MRS.MODEL_PRICE_VAT*/ , DECODE(MQ.PROD_TYPE,'01', MRS.MODEL_PRICE + MRS.MODEL_PRICE_VAT, NULL, MRS.MODEL_PRICE + MRS.MODEL_PRICE_VAT,'02', MRS.RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT) AS MODEL_PRICE , MQ.PROD_TYPE , MRS.MODEL_DISCOUNT1 , MRS.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, MRS.MODEL_DISCOUNT3, CASE WHEN OOIM.ORGN_NM IS NOT NULL THEN OOIM.ORGN_NM WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011741' THEN 'M모바일(직영온라인)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011744' THEN 'M모바일(사내특판)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011745' THEN '총판((주)프리피아)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100005928' THEN 'M모바일(직영온라인)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100013265' THEN '홈쇼핑' ELSE '온라인' END AS AGENT_CODE, MQ.OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE AS CSTMR_TYPE_ORG, DECODE(CSTMR_TYPE , 'NM','NA','FN','NE',CSTMR_TYPE) AS CSTMR_TYPE, MQ.ETC_SPECIAL, MQ.REQ_USIM_NAME, TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_USIM_SN) AS REQ_USIM_SN, PHONE_PAYMENT, SUBSTR (TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1, 4) AS REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY, SUBSTR (TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD'), 5, 2) AS REQ_IN_DAY_MM, SUBSTR (TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD'), 7, 2) AS REQ_IN_DAY_DD, DECODE (NVL (MRS.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0), '0', '1', MRS.MODEL_MONTHLY) AS MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, /** 할부 개월수 **/ MODEL_MONTHLY, MQ.REQ_ADDITION, TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_ADDITION_PRICE) AS REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, MRS.USIM_PRICE_TYPE, TO_CHAR (MRS.USIM_PRICE) AS USIM_PRICE, MRS.JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, MRC.CSTMR_NAME, /**substr(MRC.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN,1,6) AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, **/ CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, NVL(( SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE DTL_CD = MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION AND CD_GROUP_ID = 'NATIONLIST' ), MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN, DECODE(MRC.CSTMR_TEL_FN || MRC.CSTMR_TEL_MN || MRC.CSTMR_TEL_RN, CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , MRC.CSTMR_TEL_FN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_TEL_MN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_TEL_RN , MRC.CSTMR_TEL_FN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_TEL_MN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_TEL_RN || ','|| CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || '-' || CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || '-' || CSTMR_MOBILE_RN ) AS CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN, CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, CSTMR_MAIL, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, 1, 4) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_YYYY, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, 5, 2) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_MM, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, 7, 2) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_DD, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, 1, 4) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_YYYY, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, 5, 2) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_MM, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, 7, 2) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_DD, MRC.CSTMR_ADDR || ' ' || MRC.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS CSTMR_ADDR, MRC.CSTMR_ADDR_BJD, MRC.OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM, MRC.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER, MRC.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER, MRC.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, MCENB.CODE_NAME AS REQ_BANK, MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, MRR.REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, MRR.REQ_CARD_COMPANY, MRR.REQ_CARD_NO, MQ.REQ_WANT_NUMBER, MQ.REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, MQ.REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, MRR.REQ_WIRE_TYPE, MQ.REQ_PAY_TYPE, TO_CHAR (MRP.REQ_AC01_BALANCE) AS REQ_AC01_BALANCE, TO_CHAR (MRP.REQ_AC01_AMOUNT) AS REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, MRP.REQ_AC02_DAY, TO_CHAR (MRP.REQ_AC02_AMOUNT) AS REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, CASE WHEN(MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN IS NOT NULL ) THEN MRM.REQ_GUIDE_FN||'-'||MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN||'-'||MRM.REQ_GUIDE_RN ELSE '' END AS REQ_GUIDE, MRM.REQ_GUIDE_FN, MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN, MRM.REQ_GUIDE_RN, DECODE (MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_MN, NULL, NULL, MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || '-' || MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || '-' || MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_RN) AS MOVE_MOBILE_FN, DECODE (MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_MN, NULL, NULL, MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || '-' || MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || '-' || MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_RN) AS RWD_MOBILE_NO, MRM.MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 1, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_1, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 2, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_2, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 3, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_3, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 4, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_4, MRM.MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MRM.MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MRM.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, CASE WHEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY IN ('SKT', 'LGT', 'KTF') THEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY WHEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY IS NOT NULL THEN 'MVNO' ELSE '' END AS MOVE_COMPANY, CASE WHEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY IN ('SKT', 'LGT', 'KTF') THEN '' ELSE MC.DTL_CD_NM END AS MOVE_COMPANY_MVNO, MR.BASE_AMT AS MONTHLY_FEE, MR.RATE_NM AS RATE_NAME, '3' AS PAGE3DEFAULT, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_NM, DECODE (MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN, NULL, NULL, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN || '-' || MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN || '-' || MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN) AS NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_RRN, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, MRA.MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MCMINOR.CODE_NAME AS MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, MRA.MINOR_AGENT_RRN, DECODE ( MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, NULL, NULL, MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || '-' || MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || '-' || MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN) AS MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, MRA.ENTRUST_REQ_NM, MRA.ENTRUST_RES_NM, MCENT.CODE_NAME AS ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, MRR.REQ_CARD_NAME, MRA.ENTRUST_RES_RRN, MQ.SERVICE_TYPE, MQ.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, MQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE, MQ.REQ_MODEL_NAME, MQ.REQ_MODEL_COLOR, DECODE ( MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, NULL, NULL, MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN || '-' || MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN || '-' || MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN) AS ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, MRR.REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, CASE WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN REQ_CARD_RRN WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN ELSE CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN END OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, CASE WHEN MINOR_AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL OR (REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' AND REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = 'Y') OR (REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' AND REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = 'Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG, CASE WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN REQ_CARD_NAME WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME ELSE CSTMR_NAME END OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, NVL(MCMINOR.CODE_NAME, '본인') AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION , NVL( MRS.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0 ) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT, MQ.NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, MQ.APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, MQ.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, DECODE(MQ.APP_CD,'1','1','3','3', null,'' ,'','','0')AS APP_CD, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM MCP_CODE@DL_MCP WHERE CODE_SYS='CHA' AND CODE=MQ.APP_CD)AS APP_CD_NAME, '0'AS ETC_DISCOUNT, MRS.SPRT_TP, /* 지원금 유형 */ MRS.MODEL_ID, MR.RATE_CD, OSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD, MQ.CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, --단말배상금 안내사항 동의여부 MQ.CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, --단말배상금(부분파손) 안내사항 동의여부 MQ.CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, --중고렌탈 프로그램 서비스 이용에 대한 동의서 동의여부 MQ.CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, --선불요금제 MPPS35 제약사항 동의 여부 MQ.CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, --동부화재 제휴 요금제 약관 동의 여부 MQ.CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG, MQ.INSR_CD, MQ.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, --온라인인증유형(C:카드,X:공인인증서) MQ.INSR_PROD_CD, --단말보험코드 MQ.CLAUSE_INSR_PROD_FLAG, --단말보험가입동의 MQ.INSR_AUTH_INFO, --단말보험인증정보 MQ.CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG, -- 5g 커버리지 확인 및 가입 동의 MQ.RWD_PROD_CD, MQ.CLAUSE_RWD_FLAG, MQ.RWD_AUTH_INFO , USIM_KINDS_CD , EID , REQ_PHONE_SN , ON_OFF_TYPE , PRNTS_BILL_NO , MQ.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE , MQ.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE , MRS.SETTL_WAY_CD , NVL(MRS.SETTL_AMT,0) SETTL_AMT , MQ.CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG , MQ.JEHU_PROD_TYPE , MQ.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER , MQ.JEHU_PARTNER_TYPE , MQ.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE , MQ.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE , CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , MQ.COMBINE_SOLO_FLAG , MQ.INDV_LOCA_PRV_AGREE , MQ.KT_COUNSEL_AGREE FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP MQ, MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP MRC, MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP MRR, MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP MRP, MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP MRM, MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP MRS, NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP MC, msp_rate_mst MR, /* MCP_RATE MR, */ MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP MRCG, MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP MRA, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MCMINOR, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MCENT, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MCENB, ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST OOIM, MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST OSPM WHERE MQ.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MQ.REQUEST_KEY AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRR.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRP.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRS.REQUEST_KEY AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRM.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRCG.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRA.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MC.CD_GROUP_ID(+) = 'NSC' AND MC.DTL_CD(+) = MRM.MOVE_COMPANY AND MRS.SOC_CODE = MR.RATE_CD AND MCMINOR.CODE_SYS(+) = 'AGR' AND MCMINOR.CODE(+) = MRA.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION AND MCENT.CODE_SYS(+) = 'AGR' AND MCENT.CODE(+) = MRA.ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION AND MCENB.CODE_SYS(+) = 'BNK' AND MCENB.CODE(+) = MRR.REQ_BANK AND MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = OOIM.ORGN_ID(+) AND MRS.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE = OSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) )A, MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST B WHERE A.SALE_PLCY_CD = B.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) AND A.SOC_CODE = B.RATE_CD(+) AND A.MODEL_ID = B.PRDT_ID(+) AND A.ENGG_MNTH_CNT = B.AGRM_TRM(+) AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = B.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.OPER_TYPE = B.OPER_TYPE(+) ) APPDATA ) MAINDATA

SELECT /* /appform/getChrgPrmtId : McpAppformMapper.selectChrgPrmtId (셀프개통) 직영 프로모션 아이디 가져오기 */ DISTINCT PRMT_ID FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL A, MCP_ADDITION@DL_MCP B WHERE A.ADDITION_KEY = B.ADDITION_KEY
AND #{reqInDay} BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT
AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT
AND A.ORGN_ID = #{cntpntShopId} --접점코드 AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = #{reqBuyType} --구매유형 AND A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' --약정기간 AND A.RATE_CD = #{socCode} -- 요금제코드 AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' --사용여부
AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y' --번호이동
AND A.NAC_YN = 'Y' --신규
AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = #{onOffType} --온라인오프라인구분
